title: Allometry exponent 0.35->0.25 (perception range trim)
notes: Perception mean -8% but wall p99 -1.1ms < noise floor. Kept for biological correctness, NOT a confident perf win. commit context: 6ef44f4

title: fast_inv_sqrt in distance/normalize hot path
notes: Stacked with T1.3 gave 48.5ms vs 48.0 baseline - flat/worse, within noise. Reverted 87022fa.

title: Rayon chunk size 64->256
notes: No budget movement, within noise. Reverted 87022fa.

title: SIMD-vectorize perception reject scan
notes: Estimated <1ms true effect, below noise floor. Not worth complexity. Do not revisit unless the perception algorithm changes shape.

title: Bevy Changed<> query filters to skip unchanged entities
notes: Double-counts with the frequency throttle (power-of-2 bucketing already skips most entities/tick). Redundant.

title: repr(align(16)) on hot components
notes: No measurable effect; SoA columns already cache-friendly.

title: Flat dense-array spatial grid
notes: Already implemented. Not an open idea.

title: Persistent thread-local scratch buffers in perception
notes: Already implemented (perception/systems.rs:42-49).

title: Parallelize L1 aggregation: Rayon owned-partition scatter replacing the serial non-empty-cell reduce
notes: FALSE POSITIVE — lab reported -2951us/-1523us but real-hardware A/B showed a REGRESSION: serial L1 ~3ms, parallel ~6ms, tripping the 50ms budget. Committed a0aa4e8 then REVERTED. Root cause: bit-identity forces output-partitioning, so each of ~167 L1 row-bands re-scans the ENTIRE L0 non-empty list -> ~O(L1_height x non_empty) work blowup that parallelism can't recover. DO_NOT_REVISIT this approach. Lab mis-measured it; see RCA in perf-hunt/rca-2026-06-24-l1.md.

title: Bound the L1 cone double-loop by inscribed circle + facing half-plane (bit-identical)
notes: Triage @500k only. Target phase REGRESSED +247us vs 91us noise (extra per-column sqrt+bound outweighs ~21% corner-cell save). dWallP99=-1078us inside wall noise 1272us — no real wall win. Candidate diff was already present in working tree at task start; measured then reverted.

title: Hoist redundant max_accel divide + defer SteeringContext build to the wander arm
notes: FULL @1M: steering dPhaseP99=-340us sits ON noise floor 337us (no reliable phase win); dWallP99=-1161us beats wall noise but worstPhaseReg=+40us and target signal indistinguishable from noise -> gate Ditch. Sound micro-op below detection bar at 1M. Reverted.
retest: median-gate-8255f67: wall -1161us beat wall noise and phase -340us sat ON the old p99 floor (337us); the median floor is ~10x smaller, so re-eligible.

title: Cost-decorrelated throttle bucketing: scramble+cost-key the perception bucket so giants spread across ticks
notes: Triage @500k only. Perception REGRESSED +475us vs 91us noise (scramble+keyed-gate overhead + worse cache locality cost more than tail flattening saves). dWallP99=-78us far inside wall noise 1272us. Hypothesis not supported. Reverted.

title: Break a fork-join barrier: overlap update_body_size_cache with the perception subchain
notes: FULL @1M: behavior dPhaseP99=-220us just beats phase noise 127us but tiny; dWallP99=-777us BELOW wall noise 908us — not a credible end-to-end win. Reorder is correct (bit-identical + cache-invariant tests) but payoff vanishes into noise at scale. Reverted.
retest: median-gate-8255f67: phase win was real (-220us > 127us) but wall -777us sat below the old 908us wall floor; the median wall floor is ~124-800us, so the end-to-end win may now bank. Re-eligible.

title: Bundle (stacked DEFER union)
notes: No bundle formed this run — only one KEEP (parallel-l1-aggregation) and zero DEFERs to stack. Nothing to A/B as a union.

title: Steering avoidance: sqrt-free closing-direction pre-filter before the normalize divide
notes: Triage @500k only. Steering dPhaseP99=-113us inside phaseNoise 137us (not a real signal); dWallP99=+150us moved the wrong way (wallNoise 325us). Converging-neighbor path adds a divide it didn't have; in dense packs most in-range neighbors converge, so hot path got marginally more work — net wash buried in noise. Reverted; clean-tree guard re-passed.

title: T3.1 Software-pipeline grid rebuild + L1 aggregation to overlap the previous tick's steering/movement
notes: Triage @500k only. grid_rebuild p99 5600 vs 3653us -> dPhaseP99=+1947us REGRESSION (>> phaseNoise 63us); wall dWallP99=+4613us hard regression (wallNoise 192us). rayon::join overlap + collect_grid_snapshot Vec alloc + L1 double-buffer cost more than serial schedule; movement and grid arms contend rather than overlap at this scale. Reverted; clean-tree guard re-passed.

title: T2.2 Sated-predator skip of the L1 strategic cone scan (Golden Zone hunger gate)
notes: Triage @500k=Defer (perception dPhaseP99=-252us ~4.7sigma, dWallP99=-241us sub-noise but negative) -> escalated. FULL @1M=Ditch: perception gain collapsed to -40us vs phaseNoise 249us, dWallP99=+592us (got slightly worse, sub-noise). Honesty caveat realized: no feeding loop -> energy monotone-drains -> sated cohort thin under bench drain; instantaneous win too small to clear p99 tail at full scale. Reverted; clean-tree guard re-passed.

title: T2.5 stochastic per-entity perception phase offset (de-sync the throttle buckets, frequency-invariant)
notes: Triage @500k only. perception dPhaseP99=+78us WORSE (phaseNoise 24us); dWallP99=+240us regression (wallNoise 226us). Frequency-invariant gate cannot reduce mean cost — only reshuffles which tick a giant lands on; on this HW the reshuffle didn't flatten the p99 tail and added a hash+add per gated entity, netting slight regression. Patch needed whitespace repair before apply. Reverted; clean-tree guard re-passed.

title: De-throttle steering cost: hoist thread_rng to a seeded PRNG + skip wander RNG for exhausted creatures
notes: Triage @500k only. SLOWER on both targeted steering (+222us vs phaseNoise 83us) and wall (+1526us, order of magnitude above wallNoise 170us). xorshift jitter + per-creature is_exhausted() branch + PhysicsTick resource read didn't save over thread_rng and perturbed the hot par_iter loop. Reverted; clean-tree guard re-passed.

title: Bundle (stacked DEFER/KEEP union)
notes: No bundle formed — zero KEEPs and zero surviving DEFERs this run. All five candidates DITCHED (one after escalating to 1M). Nothing to A/B as a union.

title: L1 cone scan: per-row x-span (disc rasterization) to skip range-rejected corner cells, bit-identical
notes: Triage-only @500k (seeds 11,42,99). dPhaseP99=+17us within phaseNoise=299us (no measurable win); dWallP99=+613us > wallNoise=308us (slight regression, not clearly negative) -> triage_only, no escalation. Disc-rasterization adds per-row sqrt + bound math but the L1 cone box scan isn't the bottleneck at this radius (cells_queried p99 essentially unchanged 1277254 vs 1277263), so it only adds overhead. Reverted clean; guard passed.

title: L1 cone scan: gate expensive cell math behind the occupancy check (skip empty-cell tax)
notes: Triage-only @500k (seeds 11,42,99). dPhaseP99=+110us below phaseNoise=190us (indistinguishable from zero); dWallP99=+670us (slight wall regression, not clearly negative) -> triage_only, no escalation. The upfront get_biosignature + is_empty branch to short-circuit classify_l1_cell nets no win — classify_l1_cell is already cheap enough that the extra branch/fetch costs more than it saves. Reverted clean; guard passed.

title: L1 cone scan: reuse the L0 loop's l1_cache to drop redundant classify_l1_cell calls
notes: Triage-only @500k (seeds 11,42,99). dPhaseP99=+592us, dWallP99=+1785us (clearly POSITIVE = candidate slower; phaseNoise=70us wallNoise=368us) -> stopped at triage. The L1-classification-cache (sized for the L0 neighbor set) misses on the wider cone-swept L1 cells, so cache lookup/insert overhead exceeds the saved get_biosignature+classify_l1_cell; perception regressed. Reverted clean; guard passed.

title: Store precomputed mass in PerceptionProxy to kill per-scan powi(3) in size-domination filter
notes: Triage @500k -> escalated to 1M (clean wall at triage). @1M (seeds 11,42,99,137,2025): dPhaseP99=+400us ABOVE phaseNoise=219us -> a REAL perception regression at scale; dWallP99=-951us sits INSIDE its own 957us wall noise so the wall win is not credible. Precomputing mass at grid-build moves powi(3) out of perception but extra field load / cache pressure on the proxy hot path outweighs the saved cube. No defensible win. Reverted clean; guard passed.

title: Perception proxy SoA split: hot [x,y,radius] reject-scan stream vs cold [vx,vy,entity]
notes: Triage-only @500k (seeds 11,42,99). dPhaseP99=+102us > phaseNoise=55us (regression); dWallP99=+427us (candidate slower, not clearly negative) -> triage_only, no escalation. Hot/cold SoA split did NOT help: the extra cold-array re-index on accept plus impl-Iterator AoS reconstruction for low-freq callers outweighed any reject-scan cache-density gain at this density. Reverted clean; guard passed.

title: Drop the redundant sqrt-based FOV cull in collect_cells_sorted_fov (bitmask re-culls the same 3x3)
notes: Triage-only @500k (seeds 11,42,99). dPhaseP99=+327us, dWallP99=+1080us (clearly POSITIVE = regression; phaseNoise=78us wallNoise=224us) -> no escalation. Dropping the collect-time FOV cone cull ADDS cells back into the query set: cells_queried p99 rose ~1.278M->1.786M (+40%); the downstream bitmask re-cull (looser 72.5deg) doesn't compensate. Both perception and wall regressed. Reverted clean; guard passed.

title: Kill per-tick query.iter_mut().collect() allocation (Windows page-fault tax) via capacity-stable buffers
notes: Triage-only @500k (seeds 11,42,99). dPhaseP99=+757us > phaseNoise=285us (wrong direction); dWallP99=+2093us > wallNoise=1023us (regression, not clearly negative) -> no escalation. Pre-sized Vec::with_capacity(hwm)+extend collect regressed the fattest steering phase rather than helping. Reverted clean; guard passed.

title: T2.1 perception range hard cap (atmospheric-extinction ceiling) to collapse the giant L1-cone tail
notes: Triage @500k -> escalated to 1M (wall negative but within noise; escalated to be safe). @1M (seeds 11,42,99,137,2025): dPhaseP99=-315us within phaseNoise=767us; dWallP99=-189us within wallNoise=2604us — both tiny improvements buried far inside their own noise floors. The 450m extinction cap doesn't bound enough giant cones at this realistic-DNA population to move the p99 tail; worst-case L1 cones owning the tail already fall under/near the cap or are too rare. Functionally sound, no perf payoff. Reverted clean; guard passed.
retest: median-gate-8255f67: both improvements (-315us phase, -189us wall) were buried in HUGE old floors (767us/2604us); under the median floors (~200us) they may surface. Re-eligible, marginal.

title: Size-gated steering reaction latency (coast-on-momentum throttle for large creatures)
notes: Triage @500k (Defer) -> escalated to 1M. @1M (seeds 11,42,99,137,2025): phase verdict=Ditch (dPhaseP99=-524us vs phaseNoise=340us, ~1.5x, below tool KEEP bar + tiny +28us worst-phase regression). HOWEVER wall p99 improved -2.507ms vs wallNoise=1.707ms — a clear beyond-noise total-tick win, consistent in direction from triage (-0.938ms) to full (-2.507ms). DISCREPANCY FLAGGED: phase gate says Ditch but end-to-end wall is a real win (parallel Rayon phase boundaries can hide work that surfaces as overall tick reduction). steering_divisor=4, gate length>=5.0m to steer 1-in-4 ticks. Biological cost: giants get sluggish collision-avoidance; trophic canary (apex/grazer +-20%) required before merge. Worth a human look. Reverted clean; guard passed.
retest: median-gate-8255f67: STRONGEST candidate. Phase -524us was only 1.5x the old p99 floor (340us) so it Ditched, but the median floor is ~150us -> detects; wall -2507us is a clear win. Re-test FIRST; still needs the trophic canary before merge.

title: Bundle (stacked KEEP/DEFER union)
notes: No bundle formed — zero KEEPs and zero surviving DEFERs. All 9 candidates DITCHED by the phase gate (two after escalating to 1M). Nothing to A/B as a union. Note: t26-size-gated-steering-latency is phase-Ditch but flagged a real -2.5ms wall p99 win for human review.

title: Hoist redundant max_accel divide + defer SteeringContext build into the Wandering arm
notes: Back-to-back triage A/B @500k (seeds 11,42,99, baseline-first). dPhaseMedian +161us within phaseNoise 304us (no real steering win, trends positive). Wall p99 across-seed p50 baseline 24558us vs cand 25432us = +874us regression. Bit-identical micro-op but signal does not clear the median floor; dWallP99 not clearly negative so triage_only, no escalation. Reverted clean; guard passed both sides.

title: Size-gated steering reaction latency (giants coast on momentum, re-steer 1-in-4 ticks)
notes: Triage A/B @500k (seeds 11,42,99, baseline-first). dPhaseMedian -15us WITHIN phaseNoise 45us (no measurable steering win); wall p99 across-seeds mean REGRESSED 24480->25759us (+1279us). Realistic log-normal DNA yields few giants so little work is skipped, while throttle-branch + index overhead nets a wall regression. BEHAVIOR CHANGE (not bit-identical): >=5.0m creatures get sluggish avoidance, coast up to 3 ticks; would need trophic canary before any merge. DITCH on perf. Reverted clean; guard passed.

title: Fuse update_steering_system + integrate_motion_system (kill a serial 1M collect + a full shared-column re-load)
notes: REPLICATED (dWall -3.746ms). Tool verdict Ditch at both pops is a PHASE-LABEL ARTIFACT: movement work re-accounted under steering, so steering balloons +6.0ms while movement collapses to 0. Real combined steer+integrate dropped ~2.9ms by deleting one serial 1M collect, one fork-join barrier, and a redundant shared-column reload. Wall banker improved robustly: full 1M/5seeds dWallMedian -3.355ms (>3x noise 1.056ms); wall p99 across-seeds p50 47754->45056us (-2.70ms), mean 48435->44515us (-3.92ms). cells_queried identical (2752367 vs 2752040) => determinism preserved. Bit-identical, no biology change, no canary. Cost: collapses two measured phases into one (weakens per-phase DETECT, must bank on wall median) + fat closure register pressure + dev-tools accel capture must move into closure. Overriding tool Ditch -> KEEP. HUMAN HOLD (2026-06-25): recorded as a TESTED perf win but deliberately NOT merged (see merge field). Tradeoffs being weighed: (1) PROFILING VISIBILITY LOST — steering and movement can no longer be measured as separate phases (movement folds to 0), blinding future per-phase DETECT on either; (2) MODULARITY/COUPLING COST — two previously-decoupled concerns (steering-force calc + motion integration) merge into one fat query+closure: the schedule gets SIMPLER (a 1M collect + fork-join barrier + redundant column reload deleted) but the code gets LESS modular and harder to read/test/profile each concern independently, plus register-pressure portability risk. Net: trades scheduling simplicity (gained) for code decoupling (lost).
merge: held — tested win; human deferring merge pending the profiling-visibility + two-concern coupling tradeoff

title: Fold aggregate_l1 into rebuild_spatial_grid_system + hoist the L1 cell accumulator out of the per-proxy inner loop
notes: Triage A/B @500k (seeds 11,42,99, baseline-first). dPhaseMedian +29us within phaseNoise 13us (effectively noise); dWallMedian +34us (positive, swamped by wallNoise 196us). Raw l1_aggregation p99 dipped 3102->3021us (~81us) but median delta sits in the floor and wall shows no net win. Bit-identical-by-design (hoisted running-reference variant; small unsafe cell_mut) but no measurable wall payoff at scale -- inner loop already memory-bound on the proxy stream. Reverted clean; guard passed.

title: Bundle (stacked KEEP/DEFER union)
notes: No bundle A/B run: exactly one KEEP (fuse-steering-integrate-system) and zero surviving DEFERs, so the union equals the single KEEP and needs no separate stacking test. Its standalone full-pop result (wall p99 -2.70ms, replicated -3.746ms) stands as the bankable win.
